attachments.fallback: Qucik Method to Convert OLM to PDF? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: To convert OLM files to PDF using the <https://www.macsonik.com/olm/pdf/|MacSonik OLM to PDF Converter Tool>, first download and install the software on your Mac. Launch the application and add the desired OLM files using the “Add File” or “Add Folder” option. Once the files are loaded, you can preview the email data and select specific folders or items for conversion. From the “Save As” or “Export As” dropdown, choose PDF as the ou…
